title: The Chomsky Hierarchy
description: A visual representation of the Chomsky hierarchy, classifying formal grammars and their corresponding automata by their expressive power and the problems they can solve.
relationships: Type 0 grammars are recognized by a Turing Machine
Type 1 grammars are recognized by a Linear-Bounded Automaton
Type 2 grammars are recognized by a Pushdown Automaton
Type 3 grammars are recognized by a Finite Automaton
Each level is a strict subset of the level above it
